questionHtml:
What could be used as evidence for evolution?

I. Selective breeding of domesticated animals

II. The fossil record

III. Homologous structures

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: What could be used as evidence for evolution? I. Selective breeding of domesticated animals II. The fossil record III. Homologous structures A. I and II only B. I and III only C. I
breadcrumbLabels: A4.2.2. Comparisons between current number of species on Earth and past levels of biodiversity
A4.1.3. Evidence for evolution from selective breeding of domesticated animals and crop plants
A4.1.4. Evidence for evolution from homologous structures
